Function.Inference: Introductory phrase establishing the groove, ending with a repeat sign |: at bar 4.
First part of the loop body in F major, ending with a || at bar 14.
Loop body continues, modulating to G major, ending with a || at bar 29.
Turnaround section returning to F major, ending with :| to loop back.

Section.Inference: Primary Theme A, presenting the main melodic motif.
Theme B, transposes the motif and introduces a contrasting rhythmic texture.
Non-thematic turnaround repeating the intro material to smoothly loop.
